ai_summary: Glenmark Life Sciences reported robust Q1 FY '24 results, with revenue growing 18.1% and PAT increasing 24.3%, primarily driven by strong demand across regulated markets, a robust CDMO business, and a favorable product mix. Gross margins saw significant improvement due to softening raw material prices, although higher manpower and new infrastructure costs partially offset these gains at the EBITDA level. The company maintains a healthy net debt-free status and guides for conservative mid-teens growth with stable margins for the full fiscal year, with no apparent red flags in this reporting.
